title: sericanthe trilocularis subsp. paroissei
intro: Sericanthe trilocularis subsp. paroissei is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It is native to tropical Africa and is also known as a medicinal plant due to its various health benefits. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat fever, malaria, and other diseases. Herbal preparations from Sericanthe trilocularis subsp. paroissei, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and respiratory issues.
